column1: Hail Emperor \x83. The \x81 empire genuinely thanks you for your generous tribute in difficult times.
column2: \x83皇帝陛下,\x81帝國由衷感謝您在艱困時刻慷慨進貢。

column1: Many \x81s have looked to the \x80 empire with great distrust, but your tribute has now won over the conviction of many.
column2: 許多\x81人原本對\x80帝國深感不信任,但您的進貢如今已贏得不少人的認同。

column1: Your tribute has been accepted as reparations for your crimes against the \x81 empire.
column2: 您的進貢已被接受,作為您對\x81帝國所犯罪行的賠償。

column1: Diplomatic channels between the \x80 and \x81 empires have been tenuous at best, but your tribute now offers a way to significantly reduce the tension.
column2: \x80與\x81兩帝國間的外交管道向來脆弱,但您的進貢如今提供了大幅緩和緊張情勢的途徑。

column1: Emperor \x83, the \x81 empire applauds your generous tribute and welcomes future cooperation.
column2: \x83皇帝陛下,\x81帝國讚賞您慷慨的進貢,並樂見未來的合作。

column1: You have made a wise choice in offering tribute to an obviously superior race.
column2: 向明顯更為優越的種族進貢,是您明智的抉擇。

column1: The \x81 empire greatly appreciates your support with such a magnanimous contribution.
column2: \x81帝國十分感激您以如此慷慨的捐獻給予支持。

column1: Emperor \x83, your generous tribute has laid many \x81 grievances with your empire to rest.
column2: \x83皇帝陛下,您慷慨的進貢已平息了\x81人對貴帝國的諸多怨懟。

column1: Emperor \x83, your magnificent contribution will go far toward establishing a lasting peace and a hopeful future for both our peoples.
column2: \x83皇帝陛下,您豐厚的捐獻將大有助於為我們兩族建立持久的和平與充滿希望的未來。

column1: With tribute such as this, both our empires will soon be able to exist together in perfect harmony.
column2: 有了這樣的進貢,我們兩個帝國很快便能和睦共存。

column1: Your contributions to establish mutual trade between our two empires has greatly enhanced our relations.
column2: 您為建立我們兩帝國互惠貿易所作的貢獻,大大增進了我們的關係。

column1: The trade between the \x80 and the \x81 empires has greatly relaxed current tension levels.
column2: \x80與\x81兩帝國間的貿易已大幅緩和了當前的緊張情勢。

column1: Emperor \x83, the trade between our two empires has not only increased our production but has also formed a basis for mutual respect and cooperation.
column2: \x83皇帝陛下,我們兩帝國間的貿易不僅提升了生產力,也奠定了相互尊重與合作的基礎。

column1: The prosperous trade between our two empires has formed a solid financial foundation from which both our empires can benefit.
column2: 我們兩帝國間繁榮的貿易已形成穩固的財政基礎,讓雙方都能受益。

column1: Although our empires have had disagreements in the past, mutual trade has certainly relieved some of the tension.
column2: 儘管我們的帝國過去曾有歧見,互惠貿易確實緩和了部分緊張情勢。

column1: Continued trade between the \x80 and the \x81 empires is of extreme importance if both our empires are to resist the threat of others.
column2: 若我們兩帝國要抵禦他人的威脅,\x80與\x81之間持續的貿易便至關重要。

column1: The trade you offered has given our two empires an opportunity to strengthen our alliance.
column2: 您提出的貿易讓我們兩帝國有機會鞏固彼此的同盟。

column1: The prosperous trade between the \x80 and the \x81 empires has provided excellent incentives to maintain a lasting peace between our two empires.
column2: \x80與\x81兩帝國間繁榮的貿易,為維繫雙方持久的和平提供了絕佳的誘因。

column1: Our mutual trade has marked a new era of cooperation between the \x80 and the \x81 empires.
column2: 我們的互惠貿易標誌著\x80與\x81兩帝國合作的新時代。

column1: Together our empires can challenge the threat of the evil \x86 empire.
column2: 我們的帝國攜手,便能挑戰邪惡的\x86帝國所帶來的威脅。

column1: Your attacks against the insidious \x86 proves the honor in your words of peace.
column2: 您對陰險的\x86發動的攻擊,證明了您和平宣言中的誠意。

column1: Emperor \x83, you to must now realize the incredible threat the \x86 empire poses to both our worlds.
column2: \x83皇帝陛下,您如今也必須認清\x86帝國對我們兩個世界所構成的巨大威脅。

column1: It would seem that both our empires share a common enemy, the loathsome \x86s.
column2: 看來我們兩帝國有著共同的敵人——可憎的\x86人。

column1: Obviously the \x86 menace has even reached the \x80 empire. Together we will smite the infidel dogs.
column2: 顯然\x86的威脅甚至已波及\x80帝國。讓我們攜手痛擊這些異教走狗。

column1: Watch yourself Emperor \x83. We will no longer tolerate espionage attempts against our empire.
column2: 放尊重點,\x83皇帝。我們再也不會容忍針對我方帝國的間諜行動。

column1: We have known of your espionage operations for quite some time, and our patience wears thin.
column2: 您的間諜行動我們早已知曉多時,而我們的耐心正逐漸耗盡。

column1: We have had great restraint thus far tolerating your bungling espionage attempts, but soon you shall feel the wrath of the \x81 empire.
column2: 至今我們已極度克制,容忍您拙劣的間諜行動,但您很快就會感受到\x81帝國的怒火。

column1: The \x81 empire is compelled to protest your persistent \x84 espionage attempts.
column2: \x81帝國不得不抗議您持續不斷的\x84間諜行動。

column1: Obviously you have underestimated our patience in dealing with \x84 espionage. If you continue, it will most certainly lead to open hostilities.
column2: 顯然您低估了我們應對\x84間諜活動的耐心。若您執意如此,勢必導致公開的衝突。

column1: Your \x84 espionage attempts are creating tension between the \x80 and \x81 the empires.
column2: 您的\x84間諜行動正在\x80與\x81兩帝國間製造緊張。

column1: In the past the \x81 empire has been kind to inferior species, but if you persist in the sabotage of our \x82 we will eliminate the \x80 threat once and for all.
column2: 過去\x81帝國一向善待低等物種,但若您執意破壞我方的\x82,我們將徹底剷除\x80這個威脅。

column1: Surely Emperor \x83, you must realize that sabotage will surely jeopardize any future relations.
column2: \x83皇帝陛下,您當然明白,破壞行動必將危及未來的一切關係。

column1: Continued sabotage against our \x82 in the \x85 star system will soon place our empires precariously close to the brink of war.
column2: 持續破壞我方在\x85星系的\x82,很快就會使我們的帝國危險地逼近戰爭邊緣。

column1: Continue to sabotage our \x82 and you will plunge us into a foolish and costly war.
column2: 若繼續破壞我方的\x82,您將把我們拖入一場愚蠢而代價慘重的戰爭。

column1: Emperor \x83, hear this. Discontinue any further attempts of sabotage against the \x81 empire or face the consequences of your actions.
column2: \x83皇帝陛下,聽好了。停止對\x81帝國的一切破壞行動,否則自行承擔後果。

column1: Your bungling attempts to sabotage our \x82 is shattering what little peace we still have.
column2: 您拙劣地破壞我方\x82的企圖,正在摧毀我們僅存的些許和平。

column1: The \x81 empire will not stand for acts of terrorism such as the sabotage attempt at \x85. Wars have begun over less.
column2: \x81帝國絕不容忍像\x85破壞企圖這樣的恐怖行徑。比這更小的事都曾引發戰爭。

column1: Emperor \x83, if you wish to avert a senseless war you will immediately discontinue all sabotage operations launched against the \x81 empire.
column2: \x83皇帝陛下,若您想避免一場毫無意義的戰爭,就請立即停止對\x81帝國發動的一切破壞行動。

column1: Too many \x80 ships have been amassing along our border. Remove the ships or face the perils of war.
column2: 過多的\x80艦船正在我方邊境集結。撤走這些艦船,否則便要面對戰爭的凶險。

column1: Do you take us for complete morons? The build up of ships along our border can only be interpreted as a prelude to war.
column2: 您當我們是徹頭徹尾的蠢蛋嗎?在我方邊境集結艦船,只能被視為戰爭的前奏。

column1: It is doubtful you believe our conviction. Continue to amass star ships along our borders and soon we will be at war.
column2: 您恐怕並不相信我們的決心。繼續在我方邊境集結星艦,我們很快就會開戰。

column1: Despite our warnings, \x80 star ships have been seen moving through \x81 territory. Continue and they will be destroyed.
column2: 儘管我們已提出警告,仍有\x80星艦被發現穿越\x81領土。若再如此,這些艦船將被摧毀。

column1: Unless you reduce the number of \x80 ships along our border, we will be forced to take pre-emptive actions.
column2: 除非您減少\x80在我方邊境的艦船數量,否則我們將被迫採取先發制人的行動。

column1: The \x80 empire has grown far too large. Continue to expand and we will be forced to take militant measures.
column2: \x80帝國已擴張得過於龐大。若繼續擴張,我們將被迫採取強硬手段。

column1: Your reckless expansion is beginning to intrude upon \x81 territory. Withdraw from our space or be destroyed.
column2: 您魯莽的擴張已開始侵入\x81領土。退出我方空域,否則便被摧毀。

column1: Your ambitious expansion cannot remain unchecked. Unless you begin to withdraw we will be forced to reclaim our territory by force.
column2: 您野心勃勃的擴張不能再不受制約。除非您開始撤退,否則我們將被迫以武力收回領土。

column1: Cease your expansion into \x81 territory or we will crush your pathetic race.
column2: 停止向\x81領土擴張,否則我們將碾碎您那可悲的種族。

column1: You are the source of perpetual humor. If you believe we would willingly condone the destruction of our ships you are greatly mistaken.
column2: 您真是永遠的笑柄。若您以為我們會甘願默許自己的艦船被摧毀,那就大錯特錯了。

column1: Many within the \x81 empire are restless and crave action. Another attack like the one at \x85 and you will give us an excuse for war.
column2: \x81帝國內部許多人躁動不安、渴望行動。再來一次像\x85那樣的攻擊,您就給了我們開戰的藉口。

column1: In the future make it a point to stay out of \x81 space, or you will be crushed utterly.
column2: 往後請務必遠離\x81空域,否則您將被徹底碾碎。

column1: The \x81s order you to cease all hostilities in the \x85 system or face the consequences of your actions.
column2: \x81人命令您停止在\x85星系的一切敵對行動,否則自行承擔後果。

column1: \x80 star ships have engaged in unlawful penetration of \x81 territory. You will discontinue such operations or suffer immediate retaliation.
column2: \x80星艦非法入侵了\x81領土。您必須停止這類行動,否則將遭到立即的報復。

column1: The \x81s order you to immediately remove all vessels from the \x85 star system or they will be destroyed.
column2: \x81人命令您立即將所有艦船撤出\x85星系,否則這些艦船將被摧毀。

column1: We are not fools. Surely you do not expect us to believe that the attack on the \x85 star system was initiated by renegade activists.
column2: 我們不是傻子。您總不會指望我們相信,對\x85星系的攻擊是叛變分子擅自發動的吧。

column1: Conflicts such as the battle at \x85 can only be interpreted as a prelude to war.
column2: 像\x85一戰這樣的衝突,只能被視為戰爭的前奏。

column1: Emperor \x83 you can not simply attack \x81 starships with impunity. Even as I speak, the \x81 empire is preparing for full scale war.
column2: \x83皇帝,您不能就這樣肆無忌憚地攻擊\x81星艦。就在我說話的此刻,\x81帝國正在為全面戰爭做準備。

column1: Emperor \x83, if you wish to avoid a pointless war between our two peoples, you must stop randomly attacking \x81 starships.
column2: \x83皇帝陛下,若您想避免我們兩族間一場毫無意義的戰爭,就必須停止隨意攻擊\x81星艦。

column1: Consider yourself fortunate Emperor \x83 that the \x81 empire is not yet ready to enter into a senseless war over the incident at \x85.
column2: \x83皇帝,您該慶幸\x81帝國尚未準備好為了\x85事件而捲入一場毫無意義的戰爭。

column1: Peace talks will soon break down if the \x80 empire does not cease attacking \x81 starships.
column2: 若\x80帝國不停止攻擊\x81星艦,和平談判很快就會破裂。

column1: The relations between our two empires is becoming quite dire. The attack on the \x85 star system was unprovoked and may soon lead to war.
column2: 我們兩帝國間的關係正變得十分嚴峻。對\x85星系的攻擊毫無緣由,恐怕很快就會引發戰爭。

column1: Attacking our colony at \x85 was quite unwise. The \x81 empire will no longer sit idle while our people are slain by \x80 dogs.
column2: 攻擊我方在\x85的殖民地實屬不智。\x81帝國絕不會再坐視我方子民被\x80走狗屠殺。

column1: Emperor, \x83, \x80 star ships have invaded and violated \x81 space. Such actions can only be construed as an act or war.
column2: \x83皇帝,\x80星艦已入侵並冒犯了\x81空域。這類行徑只能被視為戰爭行為。

column1: Whereas the destruction of our ships can be endured, the wholesale slaughtering of \x81 colonists will certainly guarantee war.
column2: 我方艦船被摧毀尚可忍受,但對\x81殖民者的大規模屠殺必將招致戰爭。

column1: The ruthless storming of the \x85 colony has destroyed whatever future our two empires may have had.
column2: 對\x85殖民地的無情強攻,已摧毀了我們兩帝國原本可能擁有的一切未來。

column1: Venture near the \x85 star system again and we will be forced to annihilate the entire \x80 race.
column2: 再敢靠近\x85星系一步,我們將被迫殲滅整個\x80種族。

column1: How can you not expect retaliation for the unprovoked attack at \x85.
column2: 您對\x85發動無端攻擊,又怎能不料到我們會報復。

column1: Your senseless attack on the \x85 star system has endangered the lives of billions on both our worlds.
column2: 您對\x85星系毫無意義的攻擊,已危及我們兩個世界數十億人的性命。

column1: The \x81 empire considers the attack on the \x85 star system an unprovoked act of war.
column2: \x81帝國視對\x85星系的攻擊為無端的戰爭行為。

column1: Emperor \x83, you will pay dearly for blatantly disregarding \x81 space and attacking the outpost at \x85. Soon you will pay dearly for your misdeeds.
column2: \x83皇帝陛下,您公然無視\x81空域並攻擊\x85的前哨站,將為此付出慘重代價。您很快就會為自己的惡行付出沉重代價。

column1: Blast you, Emperor \x83! You are jeopardizing the future of both our peoples by your senseless attacks on \x81 colonies.
column2: 該死,\x83皇帝!您對\x81殖民地毫無意義的攻擊,正在危及我們兩族的未來。

column1: How dare you enter \x81 space and attack one of our colonies. Such audacity can only be answered in kind.
column2: 您膽敢進入\x81空域並攻擊我方一處殖民地。如此放肆,只能以牙還牙。

column1: Emperor \x83, simple rhetoric will not excuse you from using biological weapons in the \x85 star system.
column2: \x83皇帝陛下,區區巧言並不能為您在\x85星系使用生化武器開脫。

column1: Use of biological weapons has placed both our empires on the brink of war.
column2: 使用生化武器已使我們兩帝國瀕臨戰爭邊緣。

column1: There can be no truth or honor in the words of one who would use biological weapons.
column2: 會使用生化武器之人,其言語中絕無真誠與榮譽可言。

column1: \x80 scum. You will pay dearly for using biological weapons on innocent colonists.
column2: \x80敗類。您對無辜殖民者使用生化武器,將為此付出慘重代價。

column1: No pathetic excuse you can offer will forgive the use of biological weapons on the \x85 star system.
column2: 您再可悲的藉口,都無法為在\x85星系使用生化武器開脫。

column1: There can be no justification whatsoever for the biological attacks on the \x85 colony.
column2: 對\x85殖民地發動生化攻擊,絕無任何正當理由可言。

column1: Obviously the \x80s are led by a madman willing to use biological weapons on a whim. Soon the \x81 empire will put an end to your madness.
column2: 顯然\x80人是由一個會一時興起就動用生化武器的瘋子所領導。\x81帝國很快就會終結您的瘋狂。

column1: The \x80 empire has become far too powerful. Expand any further and you will have to be eliminated.
column2: \x80帝國已變得過於強大。若再擴張,您就非除掉不可。

column1: The \x80 empire has become a threat to the entire galaxy. Cease expanding or face the wrath of the \x81 empire.
column2: \x80帝國已成為整個銀河的威脅。停止擴張,否則便要面對\x81帝國的怒火。

column1: The \x81 empire is tired of looking the other way while the \x80s take over the galaxy. Withdraw or prepare to die Emperor \x83.
column2: \x81帝國已厭倦對\x80人接管銀河視而不見。撤退吧,否則準備受死,\x83皇帝。

column1: We will not allow the \x80s to take over the galaxy. If necessary we will save the universe from the \x80 madness.
column2: 我們絕不容許\x80人接管銀河。必要時,我們將拯救宇宙,使其免於\x80的瘋狂。

column1: You have spread like a plague throughout the galaxy. Cease your reckless expansion or we will be forced to eliminate your threat once and for all.
column2: 您已如瘟疫般蔓延整個銀河。停止您魯莽的擴張,否則我們將被迫徹底剷除您這個威脅。

column1: Our patience is exhausted. Continue to expand and it will be war.
column2: 我們的耐心已耗盡。若繼續擴張,等待您的便是戰爭。

column1: Your interference has been tolerated long enough. Of course you know, this means war!\x8a
column2: 我們容忍您的干涉已經夠久了。您當然清楚,這意味著戰爭!\x8a

column1: You cannot escape the wrath of the \x81 empire. Prepare to die \x80 scum.\x8a
column2: 您逃不過\x81帝國的怒火。準備受死吧,\x80敗類。\x8a

column1: The \x81 empire will soon cure the galaxy of the \x80 madness.\x8a
column2: \x81帝國很快就會根治銀河,使其擺脫\x80的瘋狂。\x8a

column1: We will follow you to the ends of space and rid the universe of the \x80 infestation wherever it lies.\x8a
column2: 我們將追您至太空的盡頭,無論\x80這禍患藏身何處,都要將其從宇宙中清除。\x8a

column1: The \x81 empire is determined to free the universe from the \x80 tyranny!\x8a
column2: \x81帝國決意將宇宙從\x80的暴政中解放出來!\x8a

column1: Your actions have irrevocably changed the fate of our two empires and plunged us into a war neither can win.\x8a
column2: 您的行為已無可挽回地改變了我們兩帝國的命運,並把我們拖入一場誰都贏不了的戰爭。\x8a

column1: You have left the \x81s with only one choice: to reduce your empire to cosmic dust.\x8a
column2: 您讓\x81人別無選擇,只能把您的帝國化為宇宙塵埃。\x8a

column1: Although the \x81 empire has been reluctant to enter an intergalactic war, your insufferable acts of terrorism can no longer be permitted.\x8a
column2: 儘管\x81帝國一向不願捲入星系間的戰爭,您那令人無法忍受的恐怖行徑再也不容姑息。\x8a

column1: Soon the \x81 empire will put an end to your pathetic existence.\x8a
column2: \x81帝國很快就會終結您那可悲的存在。\x8a

column1: Time after time we have attempted to reason with you. Now you have left us with no other option than war.\x8a
column2: 我們一次又一次試圖與您講理。如今您讓我們除了戰爭別無選擇。\x8a

column1: We shall make an example of you for other worlds that would resist the might of the \x81 empire.\x8a
column2: 我們將拿您殺雞儆猴,警告其他膽敢抗拒\x81帝國威勢的世界。\x8a

column1: So Emperor \x83, you have answered our requests for peace with unprovoked acts of war. So be it. We will crush the \x80 madness that plagues the universe.\x8a
column2: \x83皇帝,您以無端的戰爭行為回應我們的和平請求。那就如此吧。我們將粉碎這肆虐宇宙的\x80瘋狂。\x8a

column1: \x80 slime. Warnings were not enough. Now you will feel the might of the \x81 empire.\x8a
column2: \x80人渣。光是警告還不夠。如今您將感受到\x81帝國的威勢。\x8a

column1: Your actions can no longer be tolerated. Prepare to perish beneath the wake of the \x81 storm.\x8a
column2: 您的行為再也不容姑息。準備在\x81風暴的肆虐下灰飛煙滅吧。\x8a

column1: The \x81 empire wishes no contact with the filthy \x80s.
column2: \x81帝國不願與骯髒的\x80人有任何往來。

column1: Stay clear of \x81 territory. Your mere existence makes us ill.
column2: 遠離\x81領土。光是您的存在就令我們作嘔。

column1: Emperor \x83, enter \x81 space and you will be destroyed on sight.
column2: \x83皇帝陛下,只要踏入\x81空域,您就會被當場摧毀。

column1: The \x81s are not interested in the affairs of lesser species. Stay clear of our territory.
column2: \x81人對低等物種的事務毫無興趣。遠離我方領土。

column1: Beware Emperor \x83, the \x81 empire has arrived to free the galaxy from the \x80 terror.
column2: 當心,\x83皇帝,\x81帝國已降臨,要將銀河從\x80的恐怖中解放出來。

column1: Shudder Emperor \x83. Soon the entire galaxy shall fall to the iron fist of the \x81 empire.
column2: 顫抖吧,\x83皇帝。整個銀河很快就會臣服於\x81帝國的鐵腕之下。

column1: Surrender now Emperor \x83 and save yourself from the inevitable fall to the \x81 empire.
column2: 即刻投降吧,\x83皇帝,讓自己免於必然敗於\x81帝國的下場。

column1: Resistance is futile. The fate of the \x80s is inevitable. Prepare to submit to the \x81 Empire.
column2: 抵抗是徒勞的。\x80人的命運無可逆轉。準備臣服於\x81帝國吧。

column1: Your race is pathetic and worthless in the light of the glorious \x81 empire.
column2: 在光榮的\x81帝國面前,您的種族既可悲又一文不值。

column1: Harken Emperor \x83, the magnificent, illustrious and godlike \x81s have arrived.
column2: 聽好了,\x83皇帝,宏偉、顯赫、宛如神祇的\x81人已經降臨。

column1: The \x81 and \x80 empires will do fine so long as you acknowledge our superiority.
column2: 只要您承認我們的優越,\x81與\x80兩帝國便相安無事。

column1: The \x81 Empire greets the \x80s warmly, and hopes that you will prosper under our rule.
column2: \x81帝國熱情問候\x80人,並盼您在我們的統治下繁榮昌盛。

column1: Beware Emperor \x83. Any aggression will be answered with immediate retaliation from the \x81 empire.
column2: 當心,\x83皇帝。任何侵略行徑都將招致\x81帝國的立即報復。

column1: Now that we are aware of the \x80 presence, we will watch closely and tolerate no aggression.
column2: 既然我們已察覺\x80的存在,便會密切監視,絕不容忍任何侵略。

column1: Make no mistake Emperor \x83. The \x81 empire absolutely will not tolerate any interference from the \x80s.
column2: 別搞錯了,\x83皇帝。\x81帝國絕對不會容忍\x80人的任何干涉。

column1: So, another race has entered \x81 space. Be careful to not irritate the powerful and wise Emperor \x89.
column2: 看來又有一個種族進入了\x81空域。當心別激怒強大而睿智的\x89皇帝。

column1: The \x81 empire realizes the difficulties of first contact with another race. Hopefully we will overcome our mutual distrust.
column2: \x81帝國深知與另一個種族初次接觸的困難。但願我們能克服彼此的不信任。

column1: Now that we share common territory, the survival of both our races depends on mutual cooperation.
column2: 既然我們共享領土,我們兩族的存續便有賴於彼此的合作。

column1: Oh illustrious \x83, surely our two empires can live in peace and harmony.
column2: 喔,顯赫的\x83,我們兩帝國定能和睦共處。

column1: We are delighted by our first contact with the \x80s. Let us work for a mutually beneficial relationship.
column2: 與\x80人的初次接觸令我們欣喜。讓我們攜手建立互惠的關係。

column1: Hail Emperor \x83. The \x81 empire greatly welcomes our future relations.
column2: \x83皇帝陛下,\x81帝國衷心期盼我們未來的往來。

column1: Long live Emperor \x83 and the \x80 empire.
column2: \x83皇帝與\x80帝國萬歲。

column1: Hail wise and just Emperor \x83. The \x81s welcome a new age of honor between our two empires.
column2: 向睿智而公正的\x83皇帝致敬。\x81人歡迎我們兩帝國間一個榮譽的新時代。

column1: Emperor \x89 sends greetings to you, and desires a peaceful future between our two empires.
column2: \x89皇帝向您致意,並盼我們兩帝國能有一個和平的未來。

column1: Peace unto you, Emperor \x83! The \x81s desire a future free of conflict and strife.
column2: 願和平與您同在,\x83皇帝!\x81人渴望一個沒有衝突與紛爭的未來。

column1: The \x81 ambassador was withdrawn when war was declared.
column2: \x81大使已在宣戰時被召回。

column1: The \x81 ambassador will return when tensions have cooled.
column2: 待緊張情勢緩和,\x81大使便會回來。

column1: Emperor \x89 is not prepared to bargain with warmongers.
column2: \x89皇帝無意與好戰之徒談判。

column1: War has begun. The time for talk has passed.
column2: 戰爭已經開始。談判的時機已過。

column1: The \x81 ambassador is currently unavailable.
column2: \x81大使目前無法接見。

column1: Emperor \x89 has more pressing matters to attend to.
column2: \x89皇帝另有更要緊的事務待處理。

column1: We cannot speak at this time. More important issues require our attention.
column2: 此刻我們無法會談。有更重要的事務需要我們關注。

column1: Emperor \x89 sends his regrets that affairs of state preclude negotiations at this time.
column2: \x89皇帝深感抱歉,國事繁忙,此刻無法進行談判。

column1: Emperor \x89 feels that discussion would be inappropriate at this time.
column2: \x89皇帝認為此刻不宜會談。

column1: Hail mighty Emperor \x83. I bear greetings from the most wise: \x89 of the \x81s.
column2: 向強大的\x83皇帝致敬。我帶來最睿智的\x81人之主\x89的問候。

column1: Hail glorious Emperor \x83. I bear greetings from \x89, ruler of the \x81s.
column2: 向光榮的\x83皇帝致敬。我帶來\x81人的統治者\x89的問候。

column1: Greetings from \x89 Emperor of the \x81s.
column2: 謹致\x81人的皇帝\x89之問候。

column1: Hail revered Emperor of the \x80s. \x89 bears greetings from the most powerful \x81s.
column2: 向尊貴的\x80人皇帝致敬。\x89帶來最強大的\x81人的問候。

column1: Despite your insolence and arrogant pride, \x89 of the \x81s grants you an audience.
column2: 儘管您傲慢無禮、目中無人,\x81人之主\x89仍願接見您。

column1: We expect you have come to offer amends to the \x81 people.
column2: 想必您是為了向\x81子民賠罪而來。

column1: Emperor \x89 grants a short audience with the dishonorable Emperor \x83.
column2: \x89皇帝准予不名譽的\x83皇帝一次短暫的接見。

column1: We reluctantly grant you an audience. Be brief for our time is precious.
column2: 我們勉為其難地接見您。請長話短說,我們的時間十分寶貴。

column1: Emperor \x89 has little time to spare for you.
column2: \x89皇帝沒有多少時間留給您。

column1: In the interest of future peace, the \x81 empire proposes a Non-Aggression Pact between our two great powers.
column2: 為了未來的和平,\x81帝國提議在我們兩大強權之間締結互不侵犯協定。

column1: Expansion is dangerous. No one can outguess the other's deployments, so we propose a Non-Aggression Pact to prevent accidental conflict.
column2: 擴張是危險的。誰也無法揣度對方的部署,因此我們提議締結互不侵犯協定,以防意外衝突。

column1: We bear no ill will toward the \x80s. Let us agree to a Non-Aggression Pact to ensure future harmony.
column2: 我們對\x80人並無惡意。讓我們締結互不侵犯協定,以確保未來的和睦。

column1: Our concerns are not with the \x80 empire. Let us agree to a Non-Aggression Pact so we may concentrate our forces on others.
column2: 我們關切的並非\x80帝國。讓我們締結互不侵犯協定,好讓我們把兵力集中對付他人。

column1: The time has come for our two empires to forge an undying alliance.
column2: 我們兩帝國締結不朽同盟的時刻已經到來。

column1: The \x80 and \x81 empires are now at a point where both our peoples can coexist in perfect harmony.
column2: \x80與\x81兩帝國如今已走到我們兩族能和睦共存的地步。

column1: The \x81s offers the \x80 Empire their undying loyalty and allegiance.
column2: \x81人向\x80帝國獻上他們不渝的忠誠與效忠。

column1: The \x81 empire pledges their eternal friendship and loyalty.
column2: \x81帝國誓言永恆的友誼與忠誠。

column1: Emperor \x83, let us cement our relationship with an Alliance.
column2: \x83皇帝陛下,讓我們以同盟鞏固彼此的關係。

column1: The \x81 empire wishes to acquire a trade agreement for an exchange of \x87 BC per year.
column2: \x81帝國希望締結一份每年交易 \x87 BC 的貿易協定。

column1: Trade between our empires would benefit us both. Would you agree to \x87 BC per year?
column2: 我們帝國間的貿易對雙方都有利。您願意每年 \x87 BC 嗎?

column1: The \x81s desire your goods. Can we agree to trading \x87 BC per year?
column2: \x81人渴望您的商品。我們能否議定每年交易 \x87 BC?

column1: Emperor \x83, you must break your treaty with the \x8cs if you expect to deal with us.
column2: \x83皇帝陛下,若您指望與我們往來,就必須解除您與\x8c人的條約。

column1: We will not deal with a friend of the \x8cs. End your treaty with them first.
column2: 我們不會與\x8c人的朋友往來。請先終止您與他們的條約。

column1: Once you have ended your dealings with the \x8c empire, we can discuss our mutual future.
column2: 一旦您終止了與\x8c帝國的往來,我們便可商討彼此的未來。

column1: The friend of our enemy is our enemy. If you would deal with us, break your treaty with the \x8cs first.
column2: 敵人的朋友就是我們的敵人。若您願與我們往來,請先解除您與\x8c人的條約。

column1: Emperor \x83, the \x88s represent a threat to both our empires and we offer a reward for attacking them.
column2: \x83皇帝陛下,\x88人對我們兩帝國都構成威脅,我們願為攻擊他們提供賞賜。

column1: Emperor \x83, we will reward you greatly if you aided us by attacking the \x88 forces.
column2: \x83皇帝陛下,若您助我們攻擊\x88的部隊,我們將重重賞賜您。

column1: Our people will bestow lavish rewards on anyone who proves their hatred of the \x88s.
column2: 凡能證明自己痛恨\x88人者,我方子民都將給予豐厚的賞賜。

column1: Emperor \x89 has placed a bounty on the \x88 forces.
column2: \x89皇帝已對\x88的部隊懸賞。

column1: Any attacks on the \x88s will be greatly rewarded by our government.
column2: 任何對\x88人的攻擊,我方政府都將重重賞賜。

column1: The \x81 empire is in great need of \x8e. Perhaps you are willing to exchange it for some of our technology.
column2: \x81帝國亟需 \x8e。或許您願意用它來換取我們的一些科技。

column1: We know you have the secret of \x8e. Can we offer you some of our technology in exchange?
column2: 我們知道您掌握了 \x8e 的祕密。我們能否以一些我方科技作為交換?

column1: Emperor \x89 wishes the secret of \x8e Will you exchange it for one of our advances?
column2: \x89皇帝想要 \x8e 的祕密。您願意用它來換取我們的一項技術嗎?

column1: The \x81 race is awed by the wonders of \x8e What can we offer you for its secret?
column2: \x81族對 \x8e 的奇妙嘆為觀止。我們能以什麼來換取它的祕密?

column1: Great \x83, our war has been a tremendous strain on both our peoples. Sign a peace treaty so we can end this senseless war.
column2: 偉大的\x83,我們之間的戰爭已讓兩族不堪重負。簽署和平條約吧,好讓我們終結這場毫無意義的戰爭。

column1: This war between us is senseless. Let us call an end to it with a peace treaty.
column2: 我們之間的這場戰爭毫無意義。讓我們以和平條約終結它。

column1: Both our races have suffered greatly. Isn't it time we sought peace instead?
column2: 我們兩族都已飽受苦難。難道不該是尋求和平的時候了嗎?

column1: Emperor \x83, I bring you an offer of peace from our illustrious leader, \x89.
column2: \x83皇帝陛下,我為您帶來我方顯赫領袖\x89的和平提議。

column1: Do you still wish to suffer more? The \x81 empire sees no need to continue hostilities. Let us agree to peace.
column2: 您還想承受更多苦難嗎?\x81帝國認為沒有必要繼續敵對。讓我們議和吧。

column1: We can no longer sustain this horrible war. We offer a peace treaty to the powerful \x80 race.
column2: 我們再也無法承受這場可怕的戰爭。我們向強大的\x80族提議簽署和平條約。

column1: We are not interested at this time.
column2: 此刻我們沒有興趣。

column1: Your offer does not seem fair to us.
column2: 您的提議在我們看來並不公平。

column1: We respectfully decline your offer.
column2: 我們謹此婉拒您的提議。

column1: The \x81s do not consider your offer a fair one.
column2: \x81人不認為您的提議是公平的。

column1: Perhaps you mistook us for gullible fools. We reject your offer.
column2: 或許您把我們當成了好騙的傻瓜。我們拒絕您的提議。

column1: We are afraid we must decline.
column2: 恐怕我們必須拒絕。

column1: Emperor \x89 declines.
column2: \x89皇帝拒絕。

column1: The \x81s have considered your offer, and rejected it.
column2: \x81人已考慮過您的提議,並予以拒絕。

column1: It would not be in our best interest to accept your offer at this time.
column2: 此刻接受您的提議並不符合我們的最佳利益。

column1: Emperor \x83, the \x97 is no longer convenient. We need more room to expand.
column2: \x83皇帝陛下,這份\x97已不再合宜。我們需要更多擴張的空間。

column1: The \x97 was made in haste. Our needs have changed. We must expand in order to survive.
column2: 這份\x97訂得太過倉促。我們的需求已經改變。為了生存,我們必須擴張。

column1: Times change and we are in dire need of new star systems. We regret the necessity, but our \x97 is broken.
column2: 時局已變,我們亟需新的星系。我們對此深感遺憾,但這份\x97就此作廢。

column1: The \x81 empire must expand. The \x97 is too constraining and must be dissolved.
column2: \x81帝國必須擴張。這份\x97過於束縛,必須予以廢除。

column1: A cry has rung out through our empire for new colonies. I have no other choice than to break our \x97.
column2: 我方帝國上下都在高呼開拓新殖民地。我別無選擇,只能解除我們的\x97。

column1: We are unwilling to enter into a treaty at this time because you have broken treaties with us in the past.
column2: 此刻我們不願締結條約,因為您過去曾撕毀與我們的條約。

column1: You have not honored your past agreements. We see little reason to trust you now.
column2: 您不曾信守過往的協議。我們如今實在沒什麼理由信任您。

column1: Why should we trust you now, when you have broken so many past treaties?
column2: 您撕毀了那麼多過往的條約,我們如今憑什麼信任您?

column1: We see no reason to agree with someone who has not lived up to past promises.
column2: 對於一個不曾兌現過往承諾的人,我們看不出有什麼理由與其達成協議。

column1: We will not deal with \x80s who have no honor.
column2: 我們不會與毫無榮譽可言的\x80人往來。

column1: How can you expect us to accept when your spies are stealing our technology.
column2: 您的間諜正在竊取我們的科技,又怎能指望我們接受。

column1: Remove your spies, then we will talk.
column2: 撤走您的間諜,我們再來談。

column1: You thieving dogs, you steal the fruits of our research. We deny your request.
column2: 你們這群偷盜成性的走狗,竊取我們研究的成果。我們拒絕您的請求。

column1: Our technology is for the \x81 race. You have no right to steal it. We will talk when you stop stealing.
column2: 我們的科技是屬於\x81族的。您無權竊取。等您停止偷竊,我們再來談。

column1: Why should we give you anything? Your spies already steal everything you need!
column2: 我們憑什麼要給您任何東西?您的間諜早已偷走了您需要的一切!

column1: What! You expect us to agree when you are sabotaging our factories and bases?
column2: 什麼!您一邊破壞我們的工廠與基地,一邊指望我們答應?

column1: When you stop sabotaging our factories and bases, we can consider the matter further.
column2: 等您停止破壞我們的工廠與基地,我們才能再進一步考慮此事。

column1: We have not forgotten your last sabotage incident. Until you have proven to be more trustworthy we will not deal with you.
column2: 我們還沒忘記您上次的破壞事件。在您證明自己更值得信賴之前,我們不會與您往來。

column1: Our people have suffered from your sabotage. We will not deal with you until it ceases.
column2: 我方子民已飽受您破壞之苦。在破壞停止之前,我們不會與您往來。

column1: You destroy our factories and bases. Why should we deal with you?
column2: 您摧毀我們的工廠與基地。我們憑什麼要與您往來?

column1: We will not talk of it while you are amassing ships near our borders.
column2: 您一邊在我方邊境附近集結艦船,我們就不會談這件事。

column1: Remove your ships along our borders and we will consider accepting. Until then we are not interested.
column2: 撤走您在我方邊境的艦船,我們才會考慮接受。在那之前,我們沒有興趣。

column1: Your fleets intrude on \x81 space. Move them away, then we shall talk.
column2: 您的艦隊侵入了\x81空域。把它們調走,我們再來談。

column1: Your ships on our borders are no threat to us. But we refuse to deal while they remain.
column2: 您在我方邊境的艦船並不構成威脅。但只要它們還在,我們就拒絕往來。

column1: If you wish to deal with the \x81s, then send your ships to threaten others, not us.
column2: 若您想與\x81人往來,就把您的艦船派去威脅他人,而非我們。

column1: You attack our ships without provocation and expect us to accept? We refuse to deal.
column2: 您無端攻擊我們的艦船,還指望我們接受?我們拒絕往來。

column1: We cannot accept an offer from one who attacks our fleets.
column2: 我們無法接受一個攻擊我方艦隊之人的提議。

column1: Once your fleets have stopped attacking ours, we can talk.
column2: 等您的艦隊停止攻擊我們的,我們再來談。

column1: If you wish to deal with the \x81s, then leave our fleets alone.
column2: 若您想與\x81人往來,就別騷擾我們的艦隊。

column1: Emperor \x89 does not appreciate your destruction of our fleets. We do not accept.
column2: \x89皇帝不欣賞您摧毀我方艦隊的行徑。我們不接受。

column1: We have not forgotten the attack on the \x85 colony. There is no way that we will accept.
column2: 我們還沒忘記對\x85殖民地的攻擊。我們絕不可能接受。

column1: The dead of \x85 cry out for retribution. We hear their cries louder than your offer.
column2: \x85的亡者正在呼喊報應。他們的呼喊在我們耳中比您的提議還響亮。

column1: Your unjustified assault of \x85 gives you little room to bargain.
column2: 您對\x85毫無正當理由的攻擊,讓您幾乎沒有討價還價的餘地。

column1: Our people do not wish to deal with the butchers of \x85. Make your amends first.
column2: 我方子民不願與\x85的屠夫往來。請先做出補償。

column1: The blood from \x85 smears your words. We cannot accept your offer.
column2: \x85的鮮血玷汙了您的言語。我們無法接受您的提議。

column1: The \x81 will not make any deals with a race who would use biological weapons.
column2: \x81絕不會與一個會使用生化武器的種族達成任何交易。

column1: We cannot deal with anybody desperate enough to use biological weaponry.
column2: 我們無法與任何狗急跳牆、動用生化武器之徒往來。

column1: You use weapons that cause untold horrors on innocent populations. We refuse to deal with such madness.
column2: 您使用的武器為無辜的人民帶來無盡的恐怖。我們拒絕與這樣的瘋狂往來。

column1: The gods abhor those who would destroy planets with biological weaponry. The \x81 cannot allow it.
column2: 諸神憎惡那些以生化武器毀滅行星之人。\x81絕不容許。

column1: The cries of those killed by your biological weapons fill our ears. We cannot hear your offer.
column2: 被您生化武器殺害者的哀號充塞我們的耳際。我們聽不見您的提議。

column1: Stop all espionage operations or we will terminate our \x8b.
column2: 停止一切間諜行動,否則我們將終止我們的\x8b。

column1: Your \x84 espionage is jeopardizing our \x8b. Persist and we may be thrust into unwanted war.
column2: 您的\x84間諜活動正在危及我們的\x8b。若執意如此,我們恐怕會被迫捲入一場不願見到的戰爭。

column1: Your spies have been caught stealing \x84 secrets. If this happens again, we must take action.
column2: 您的間諜被逮到竊取\x84的祕密。若再發生,我們就必須採取行動。

column1: How can you claim to be our friend when your spies steal our technology?
column2: 您的間諜竊取我們的科技,您又怎能自稱是我們的朋友?

column1: The \x81s are angered by your theft of our research. Cease at once, or it will destroy our relationship.
column2: 您竊取我們的研究成果,\x81人對此怒不可遏。立即停止,否則將毀掉我們的關係。

column1: Withdraw your spies at once, or deal with the consequences!
column2: 立即撤走您的間諜,否則自行承擔後果!

column1: If you attempt to sabotage any more of our \x82 we will be forced to break our \x8b.
column2: 若您再企圖破壞我方任何\x82,我們將被迫解除我們的\x8b。

column1: How could the \x80s claim friendship when your spies destroy our \x82?
column2: 您的間諜摧毀我們的\x82,\x80人又怎能自稱是朋友?

column1: Your sabotage of our planets threatens the stability of our \x8b.
column2: 您對我方行星的破壞,正在威脅我們\x8b的穩定。

column1: When you destroy our \x82, be careful that our \x8b is not buried in the rubble.
column2: 當您摧毀我們的\x82時,當心別讓我們的\x8b也一同葬身瓦礫。

column1: If you sabotage any more of our facilities, we will not uphold our \x8b.
column2: 若您再破壞我方任何設施,我們就不會繼續維持我們的\x8b。

column1: Emperor \x83, if you continue to deploy ships along our border we will break our \x8b and prepare for war.
column2: \x83皇帝陛下,若您繼續在我方邊境部署艦船,我們將解除我們的\x8b並準備開戰。

column1: Your ships on our border do not indicate the level of trust that our \x8b should have.
column2: 您在我方邊境的艦船,顯然不符我們\x8b理應有的信任程度。

column1: Friend \x83, the \x81s feel threatened by your ships. Please remove them at once.
column2: \x83朋友,您的艦船讓\x81人感到威脅。請即刻將它們撤走。

column1: Our \x8b should be enough to ensure your security. You do not need so many forces on our border.
column2: 我們的\x8b理應足以確保您的安全。您不需要在我方邊境部署這麼多兵力。

column1: Your ships near our space lead us to believe you intend to break our \x8b.
column2: 您在我方空域附近的艦船,讓我們相信您意圖撕毀我們的\x8b。

column1: Attacking \x81 ships is intolerable. Another incident and we will break our \x8b.
column2: 攻擊\x81艦船是無法容忍的。再出一次這種事,我們就解除我們的\x8b。

column1: Friends do not attack friends. Be you friend or be you foe?
column2: 朋友不會攻擊朋友。您究竟是友是敵?

column1: Attacking our ships is a clear violation of our \x8b!
column2: 攻擊我們的艦船,顯然違反了我們的\x8b!

column1: You sign a treaty with one hand, and attack with the other. Have you no honor?
column2: 您一手簽下條約,一手卻發動攻擊。您難道毫無榮譽可言?

column1: Be careful that your own ships do not destroy our \x8b.
column2: 當心別讓您自己的艦船毀掉我們的\x8b。

column1: Attack our colonists again and our \x8b will be broken off immediately.
column2: 再攻擊我方殖民者一次,我們的\x8b就會立即終止。

column1: Can we hold our \x8b when you attack colonists at \x85?
column2: 您攻擊\x85的殖民者,我們的\x8b還維繫得住嗎?

column1: The families of those killed at \x85 demand that we break our \x8b.
column2: 在\x85遇害者的家屬要求我們解除我們的\x8b。

column1: The butchers of \x85 claim to be our friends. How can we believe you?
column2: \x85的屠夫竟自稱是我們的朋友。我們怎能相信您?

column1: You sign treaties with us, then attack our planets! What villainy!
column2: 您與我們簽署條約,轉頭卻攻擊我們的行星!何其卑劣!

column1: Use biological weapons again and our \x8b will be broken off immediately.
column2: 再使用一次生化武器,我們的\x8b就會立即終止。

column1: We cannot maintain a treaty with someone who uses such horrible weapons. Cease immediately!
column2: 我們無法與一個動用如此可怕武器之人維持條約。立即停止!

column1: Anybody who would use biological weapons on an innocent populace will not remain our ally for long.
column2: 任何對無辜民眾使用生化武器之人,都當不了我們長久的盟友。

column1: Are you mad? We cannot maintain a relationship with one who would sanction such biological weapons!
column2: 您瘋了嗎?我們無法與一個會容許動用此等生化武器之人維持關係!

column1: Emperor \x83, your persistent espionage attempts leave us with no choice but to break our \x8b.
column2: \x83皇帝陛下,您屢次不斷的間諜行動,讓我們別無選擇,只能解除我們的\x8b。

column1: Due to your continued theft of technology, we must end our \x8b.
column2: 由於您持續竊取科技,我們必須終止我們的\x8b。

column1: We can no longer maintain any \x8b with a pack of thieves such as the \x80s.
column2: 我們再也無法與\x80人這樣一群竊賊維持任何\x8b。

column1: You have stolen too much from the \x81s. Our \x8b is over.Emperor \x89 is furious over your thievery. Our \x8b ends now!
column2: 您從\x81人那裡偷得太多了。我們的\x8b到此為止。\x89皇帝對您的盜竊勃然大怒。我們的\x8b即刻終止!

column1: Emperor \x83, sabotage can not be tolerated. Our \x8b is broken.
column2: \x83皇帝陛下,破壞行為不容姑息。我們的\x8b就此作廢。

column1: You have persisted in your mad destruction of our \x82. Our \x8b ends now!
column2: 您執意瘋狂地摧毀我們的\x82。我們的\x8b即刻終止!

column1: Your sabotage proves you cannot be trusted. We regret that we must cancel our \x8b.
column2: 您的破壞行為證明了您不值得信賴。我們遺憾地必須取消我們的\x8b。

column1: Do you expect to maintain our relationship while destroying our \x82? Our \x8b must end now!
column2: 您一邊摧毀我們的\x82,還指望維持我們的關係?我們的\x8b必須即刻終止!

column1: Emperor \x89 has seen enough sabotage. Our \x8b is forfeit.
column2: \x89皇帝受夠了破壞行為。我們的\x8b就此作廢。

column1: Amassing a fleet along the border can only be interpreted as a prelude to war. Our \x8b is broken.
column2: 在邊境集結艦隊只能被視為戰爭的前奏。我們的\x8b就此作廢。

column1: Your fleets on our border will prove your undoing. We now end our \x8b with the \x80s.
column2: 您部署在我方邊境的艦隊將成為您的禍根。我們在此終止與\x80人的\x8b。

column1: You thought we would ignore your military buildup? Our \x8b ends now, and you will rue this day!
column2: 您以為我們會對您的軍事集結視而不見?我們的\x8b即刻終止,您將會懊悔今日!

column1: We no longer believe \x80 words of peace when your warships threaten \x81 space. Our \x8b is null and void.
column2: 您的戰艦威脅\x81空域,我們再也不信\x80的和平之辭。我們的\x8b就此失效。

column1: Emperor \x89 does not fear your fleet! Our \x8b is ripped to shreds!
column2: \x89皇帝不懼您的艦隊!我們的\x8b就此撕得粉碎!

column1: Emperor \x83, you attacked our fleet after being warned. Our \x8b is broken.
column2: \x83皇帝陛下,您在被警告後仍攻擊我方艦隊。我們的\x8b就此作廢。

column1: You back-stabbing infidels! You agree to our \x8b, then attack us! It ends now!
column2: 你們這群背後捅刀的異教徒!您同意了我們的\x8b,轉頭卻攻擊我們!到此為止!

column1: Your attack on \x81 ships proves there is no honor in our \x8b. Consider it broken.
column2: 您對\x81艦船的攻擊證明了我們的\x8b毫無榮譽可言。就當它作廢了。

column1: You have destroyed \x81 ships. The \x8b is no more.
column2: 您摧毀了\x81艦船。這份\x8b不復存在。

column1: Emperor \x89 will not stand for allies destroying \x81 ships. Our agreement ends now.
column2: \x89皇帝絕不容許盟友摧毀\x81艦船。我們的協議即刻終止。

column1: Emperor \x83, your tyrannical nature has forced us to break our \x8b. Another attack like the one at \x85 and we will be at war.
column2: \x83皇帝陛下,您暴虐的本性迫使我們解除了我們的\x8b。再來一次像\x85那樣的攻擊,我們就會開戰。

column1: Your attack on \x85 proves that the \x80s have no honor. Our treaty is over.
column2: 您對\x85的攻擊證明了\x80人毫無榮譽可言。我們的條約到此為止。

column1: We will hold no treaties with lying \x80s who attack our planets.
column2: 我們不會與攻擊我方行星、滿口謊言的\x80人維持任何條約。

column1: Our \x8b must end now. Another attack like the one at \x85 and we must retaliate.
column2: 我們的\x8b必須即刻終止。再來一次像\x85那樣的攻擊,我們就必須報復。

column1: Emperor \x89 maintains no treaties with butchers.
column2: \x89皇帝不與屠夫維持任何條約。

column1: Emperor \x83, the \x81 refuses to associate with anyone using biological weapons. Our \x8b is broken.
column2: \x83皇帝陛下,\x81拒絕與任何使用生化武器之人來往。我們的\x8b就此作廢。

column1: The \x81 will not keep any treaties with a race who would use biological weapons. Our \x8b ends now.
column2: \x81絕不會與一個會使用生化武器的種族維持任何條約。我們的\x8b即刻終止。

column1: We cannot deal with anybody desperate enough to use biological weaponry. Our \x8b is over!
column2: 我們無法與任何狗急跳牆、動用生化武器之徒往來。我們的\x8b到此為止!

column1: You use weapons that cause untold horrors on innocent populations. The \x81s refuse to keep a treaty with such madness.
column2: 您使用的武器為無辜的人民帶來無盡的恐怖。\x81人拒絕與這樣的瘋狂維持條約。

column1: The gods abhor those who would destroy planets with biological weaponry. Emperor \x89 ends our treaty and prays for your redemption.
column2: 諸神憎惡那些以生化武器毀滅行星之人。\x89皇帝終止我們的條約,並為您的救贖祈禱。

column1: Those killed by your biological weapons demand justice. We no longer hold to our \x8b.
column2: 被您生化武器殺害者要求正義。我們不再遵守我們的\x8b。

column1: As a reward for attacking the \x88s we offer a gift of \x8d
column2: 為獎勵您攻擊\x88人,我們奉上 \x8d 作為贈禮

column1: For attacking the vile \x88s we offer a gift of \x8d
column2: 為獎勵您攻擊卑劣的\x88人,我們奉上 \x8d 作為贈禮

column1: You have proven a valuable ally in attacking the \x88s. Accept \x8d from Emperor \x89.
column2: 您在攻擊\x88人一事上證明了自己是寶貴的盟友。請收下\x89皇帝所贈的 \x8d。

column1: Emperor \x89 is grateful for your attack on the \x88s. He awards you \x8d.
column2: \x89皇帝感激您對\x88人的攻擊。他賞賜您 \x8d。

column1: Emperor \x83, your attack on \x88s has pleased Emperor \x89. Accept \x8d with our gratitude.
column2: \x83皇帝陛下,您對\x88人的攻擊令\x89皇帝甚為滿意。請收下 \x8d,聊表我們的謝意。

column1: The \x80 empire is weak and will soon be eliminated.
column2: \x80帝國孱弱,很快就會被剷除。

column1: You still resist the New Repulic. You and your entire race will be erradicated.
column2: 您仍在抵抗新共和國。您與您的整個種族都將被剷除。

column1: The New Republic will not tolerate dissidents. Surrender and you will be spared execution.
column2: 新共和國不容忍異己。投降便可免於一死。

column1: The New Republic is on the verge of taking over the galaxy. Soon the \x80 empire will fall to our might.
column2: 新共和國即將接管銀河。\x80帝國很快就會敗於我們的威勢之下。

column1: Our patience is exhausted. Surrender to the New Republic and save yourself from anymore grief Emperor \x83.
column2: 我們的耐心已耗盡。向新共和國投降吧,\x83皇帝,免得自己再添悲苦。

column1: The New Republic has decided to eliminate any who will not follow. All races not submitting will be exterminated, starting with the miserable \x80s.
column2: 新共和國已決定剷除一切不肯歸順者。所有不臣服的種族都將被殲滅,就從可悲的\x80人開始。

column1: The time has come to unite the galaxy. Follow or be destroyed.
column2: 統一銀河的時刻已經到來。歸順,或是被毀滅。

column1: Shudder Emperor \x83, the \x81 storm has arrived to pave the way for the New Republic.
column2: 顫抖吧,\x83皇帝,\x81風暴已經降臨,要為新共和國開路。

column1: We understand that even emporers make foolish mistakes. Surrender and you will be spared the shame of being overthrown.
column2: 我們明白,即使是皇帝也會犯下愚蠢的錯誤。投降便可免於被推翻的恥辱。

column1: The \x81 empire is tired of playing diplomatic games. Shudder Emperor \x83 for we come for you.
column2: \x81帝國已厭倦這些外交把戲。顫抖吧,\x83皇帝,因為我們要來取您性命了。

column1: Maintaining relations with your pitiful race is no longer beneficial. We are mobilizing our fleets and preparing for war.
column2: 與您那可憐的種族維持關係已無益處。我們正在動員艦隊、準備開戰。

column1: While our ambassadors promised peace, Emperor \x89 prepared for war. You will die now.
column2: 就在我方大使許諾和平之際,\x89皇帝已在備戰。您現在就得受死。

column1: We have known all along that the \x80s could not be trusted, so we will strike first!
column2: 我們始終清楚\x80人不可信任,所以我們要先發制人!

column1: Our sincere apologies, Emperor \x83, but we must destroy you now.
column2: 我們致上誠摯的歉意,\x83皇帝,但我們現在必須毀滅您。

column1: Pardon us, we forgot to mention that we have decided to destroy the \x80 Empire now.
column2: 請見諒,我們忘了提及,我們已決定現在就摧毀\x80帝國。

column1: Emperor \x89 grows bored of diplomatic games and now wishes to play war games.
column2: \x89皇帝已厭倦外交把戲,如今想玩玩戰爭遊戲了。

column1: The \x80s hide behind a mask of diplomatic friendship. We will strike first before you can reveal your true nature.
column2: \x80人躲在外交友誼的面具之後。我們要趁您露出真面目之前先發制人。

column1: The conjunction of planets indicates that we must eradicate the \x80s from the galaxy.
column2: 行星的會合預示著,我們必須將\x80人從銀河中根除。

column1: In a vision, the ancients decreed to Emperor \x89 that we must smite the infidel \x80s. Prepare to die heathen trash.
column2: 在一場異象中,先祖向\x89皇帝降下諭令,要我們痛擊異教的\x80人。準備受死吧,異教渣滓。

column1: It looks like a nice year for war. Farewell, Emperor \x83!
column2: 看來是個適合開戰的好年頭。永別了,\x83皇帝!

column1: Emperor \x89 has declared it to be \x80 season. The hunt begins!
column2: \x89皇帝已宣布\x80狩獵季開始。獵殺就此展開!

column1: To quote a famous \x81 author, 'Cry havoc, and let slip the dogs of war!'
column2: 套句\x81某位名作家的話:「縱聲呼喊浩劫,放出戰爭的惡犬!」

column1: In the year \x8f the \x81 empire pledges to adhere to a Non-Aggression Pact and not to attack \x80 fleets unless they are orbiting one of our colonies.
column2: \x81帝國謹於 \x8f 年起承諾遵守互不侵犯協定,除非\x80艦隊進入我方殖民地的軌道,否則不予攻擊。

column1: The \x81s agree to a Non-Aggression Pact. Neither side will attack the other's fleets, unless they enter the orbit of an opposing colony.
column2: \x81人同意締結互不侵犯協定。除非一方艦隊進入對方殖民地的軌道,否則雙方都不會攻擊對方的艦隊。

column1: If you agree not to send ships to any of our colonies, the \x81 people vow to not attack any of your ships.
column2: 只要您同意不派艦船前往我方任何殖民地,\x81子民便誓言不攻擊您的任何艦船。

column1: Emperor \x89 agrees to your proposed Non-Aggression Pact. So it is written, so shall it be done!
column2: \x89皇帝同意您所提議的互不侵犯協定。一言既出,駟馬難追!

column1: Agreed, then. As long as you do not attack our colonies, the \x81 Empire will abide by the Non-Aggression Pact.
column2: 那就一言為定。只要您不攻擊我方殖民地,\x81帝國便會遵守互不侵犯協定。

column1: In the year \x8f the \x81 and \x80 empires agree to form an alliance in which neither will attack the other's fleets or colonies.
column2: \x81與\x80兩帝國謹於 \x8f 年議定結為同盟,雙方皆不攻擊對方的艦隊或殖民地。

column1: So our Alliance is forged. Your ships may visit our colonies as you wish, and get fuel from our bases.
column2: 我們的同盟就此締結。您的艦船可隨意造訪我方殖民地,並從我方基地補給燃料。

column1: Emperor \x89 welcomes an Alliance with our good friend, Emperor \x83.
column2: \x89皇帝歡迎與我們的好友\x83皇帝結為同盟。

column1: The \x81 and \x80 empires today forge an Alliance between our peoples. Death to our enemies!
column2: \x81與\x80兩帝國今日為我們兩族締結同盟。敵人皆當受死!

column1: Emperor \x89 sees the wisdom in an Alliance with the \x80 Empire. So be it!
column2: \x89皇帝看出了與\x80帝國結盟的明智之處。那就如此吧!

column1: Effective \x8f the \x81 and \x80 empires agree to trade \x95 BC per year.
column2: 自 \x8f 年起生效,\x81與\x80兩帝國議定每年交易 \x95 BC。

column1: A trade pact of \x95 BC is acceptable.
column2: 一份每年 \x95 BC 的貿易協定可以接受。

column1: The \x81s eagerly await the fine goods that the \x80s offer. We accept an agreement for \x95 BC per year.
column2: \x81人殷切期盼\x80人提供的精良商品。我們接受一份每年 \x95 BC 的協定。

column1: Emperor \x89 agrees to trade \x95 BC per year.
column2: \x89皇帝同意每年交易 \x95 BC。

column1: Well, Emperor \x83, we find your offer of \x95 BC per year to be fair and equitable.
column2: 好吧,\x83皇帝,我們認為您每年 \x95 BC 的提議公平合理。

column1: In the year \x8f the \x81 and \x80 empires agree to terminate all hostilities.
column2: \x81與\x80兩帝國謹於 \x8f 年議定終止一切敵對行動。

column1: Emperor \x89 hereby orders all hostilities to end between our empires.
column2: \x89皇帝在此下令終止我們兩帝國間的一切敵對行動。

column1: We agree that the time has come to end our petty bickering.
column2: 我們同意,結束彼此瑣碎爭執的時刻已經到來。

column1: We accept your offer of peace. Cease fire on \x81 forces, and we will stop attacking yours.
column2: 我們接受您的和平提議。對\x81部隊停火,我們便會停止攻擊您的部隊。

column1: We grow weary of this senseless destruction. The \x81s accept your offer of peace.
column2: 我們已厭倦這毫無意義的破壞。\x81人接受您的和平提議。

column1: How could we refuse one who gave us the secrets of \x90?
column2: 對於將 \x90 的祕密授予我們之人,我們又怎能拒絕?

column1: Your willingness to help us develop \x90 technology has made us grateful to you. We accept.
column2: 您願意協助我們發展 \x90 科技,令我們對您心懷感激。我們接受。

column1: The \x81 empire still remembers your generous gift of \x90 technology. We accept.
column2: \x81帝國仍記得您慷慨贈予的 \x90 科技。我們接受。

column1: Your generous gift of \x90 proved invaluable. How could we refuse?
column2: 您慷慨贈予的 \x90 證明是無價之寶。我們又怎能拒絕?

column1: Yes, Emperor \x83, the time has come for both our empires to strike out against the \x91s and eliminate them once and for all.
column2: 是的,\x83皇帝,我們兩帝國聯手痛擊\x91人、將其徹底剷除的時刻已經到來。

column1: The \x80s and \x81s must unite to strike down the \x91s.
column2: \x80人與\x81人必須聯合起來,擊倒\x91人。

column1: The \x91 empire must fall before the combined might of the \x80s and \x81s.
column2: \x91帝國必將敗於\x80人與\x81人的聯合威勢之下。

column1: With \x81s and \x80s allied, the \x91s will not last long.
column2: 有了\x81人與\x80人的結盟,\x91人撐不了多久。

column1: In the year \x8f, the \x81 and \x80 empires join forces to rid the galaxy of the \x91 menace.
column2: \x81與\x80兩帝國謹於 \x8f 年攜手合作,將\x91的威脅從銀河中清除。

column1: In view of the threat from the \x91 Empire, the \x80 and \x81 empires have no choice but to unite!
column2: 鑑於\x91帝國的威脅,\x80與\x81兩帝國別無選擇,只能聯合!

column1: We agree, the \x92s are no longer trustworthy and we have broken our alliance with them.
column2: 我們同意,\x92人已不再值得信賴,我們已與他們解除同盟。

column1: Though it pains us to turn our backs on the \x92s, we have done so.
column2: 儘管背棄\x92人令我們痛心,我們仍這麼做了。

column1: The \x92 Empire is no longer an ally of the \x81s.
column2: \x92帝國已不再是\x81人的盟友。

column1: The Alliance of the \x81 and \x92 empires now lies in shreds under our feet.
column2: \x81與\x92兩帝國的同盟,如今已碎裂於我們的腳下。

column1: As you wish, we no longer shall call the \x92s our ally.
column2: 如您所願,我們不再將\x92人稱作盟友。

column1: We ignore the hollow threats of a raving lunatic.
column2: 我們對一個狂亂瘋子的空洞威脅置之不理。

column1: You bluff poorly, Emperor \x83. Your threats do not concern us.
column2: 您虛張聲勢的功夫很差,\x83皇帝。您的威脅嚇不倒我們。

column1: Make your childish threats. The young of the \x81 often throw tantrums as well.
column2: 儘管放您那些幼稚的威脅吧。\x81的幼崽也常這樣耍脾氣。

column1: You presume to threaten the mighty Emperor \x89! You do not know who you are dealing with!
column2: 您膽敢威脅強大的\x89皇帝!您根本不知道自己在跟誰打交道!

column1: Your threats fall on deaf ears, Emperor \x83.
column2: 您的威脅有如對牛彈琴,\x83皇帝。

column1: You bray like a Rigellian jackass, Emperor \x83, and we take your threats as seriously.
column2: 您嚎叫得活像頭里傑爾蠢驢,\x83皇帝,我們也就這麼認真看待您的威脅。

column1: Do not make such threats idly, Emperor \x83. The wrath of the \x81s is terrible to behold.
column2: 別隨口發出這種威脅,\x83皇帝。\x81人的怒火可是駭人至極。

column1: We will stop attacking the border colonies and cease all spying activities.
column2: 我們會停止攻擊邊境殖民地,並停止一切間諜活動。

column1: Our attacking ships will be recalled immediately.
column2: 我們進攻的艦船將立即被召回。

column1: We do not wish to offend the mighty \x80 Empire. Our ships will leave immediately.
column2: 我們不願冒犯強大的\x80帝國。我們的艦船將立即離開。

column1: As you wish, Emperor \x83. Our star fleet and spies will bother you no further.
column2: 如您所願,\x83皇帝。我方的星際艦隊與間諜不會再來打擾您。

column1: The \x81 Empire respectfully withdraws our ships from your domain.
column2: \x81帝國謹此將我方艦船撤出您的領域。

column1: We offer \x93 BC to appease the great and powerful \x80s.
column2: 我們奉上 \x93 BC,以安撫偉大而強盛的\x80人。

column1: We pray that \x93 BC will suffice to regain your good will.
column2: 但願 \x93 BC 足以重新贏回您的善意。

column1: Here, Emperor \x83. A gift of \x93 BC.
column2: 請收下,\x83皇帝。這是 \x93 BC 的贈禮。

column1: The \x81 people offer \x93 BC to the kind \x80s.
column2: \x81子民向仁慈的\x80人奉上 \x93 BC。

column1: Emperor \x89 orders payment of \x93 BC to the \x80s.
column2: \x89皇帝下令向\x80人支付 \x93 BC。

column1: We offer \x94 tech to appease the great and powerful \x80s.
column2: 我們奉上 \x94 科技,以安撫偉大而強盛的\x80人。

column1: The \x81s are happy to share the secrets of \x94 with our friends, the \x80s.
column2: \x81人樂於與我們的朋友\x80人分享 \x94 的祕密。

column1: Emperor \x89 offers you \x94 tech as a sign of our good will and friendship.
column2: \x89皇帝向您奉上 \x94 科技,以示我們的善意與友誼。

column1: We hope that you will benefit greatly from \x94 technology, and remember well where it came from.
column2: 我們盼您能從 \x94 科技中大為受益,並牢記它的來歷。

column1: The \x81 people have no choice but to give you the secrets of \x94. Relish in our genius.
column2: \x81子民別無選擇,只能將 \x94 的祕密交予您。好好領略我們的天才吧。

column1: We will remember this.
column2: 我們會記住這筆帳。

column1: As we expected, the \x80s have proven themselves without honor.
column2: 正如我們所料,\x80人證明了自己毫無榮譽可言。

column1: The \x80 Empire will crumble under the weight of its own broken promises.
column2: \x80帝國終將在自己背棄的諾言重壓之下崩塌。

column1: So, Emperor \x83, you cannot keep your word. We will not forget this.
column2: 原來如此,\x83皇帝,您無法信守承諾。我們不會忘記這件事。

column1: An Emperor that does not honor treaties is lower than a Denebian Sewer Crawler.
column2: 一個不信守條約的皇帝,比天壇座的下水道爬蟲還要卑賤。

column1: We will inscribe the words of your broken treaties upon your tombstone, Emperor \x83.
column2: 我們會將您背棄條約的字句刻在您的墓碑上,\x83皇帝。

column1: We tire of diplomatic negotiations. We can continue discussions at a later time.
column2: 我們已厭倦外交談判。我們可以日後再繼續會談。

column1: These talks get us nowhere. We must take our leave.
column2: 這些談判毫無進展。我們必須告辭了。

column1: Emperor \x89 has heard enough. We will talk again later.
column2: \x89皇帝聽夠了。我們日後再談。

column1: Emperor \x83, you try our patience. Perhaps you should speak again later.
column2: \x83皇帝陛下,您在考驗我們的耐心。或許您該日後再來說。

column1: A thousand apologies, Emperor \x83, but other duties call.
column2: 萬分抱歉,\x83皇帝,但我另有要務在身。

column1: We have little time and much to do. Perhaps we can talk again later.
column2: 我們時間有限、事務繁多。或許我們可以日後再談。

column1: The \x80s are creatures of much wind and little action. We tire of your prattle.
column2: \x80人是一群光說不練的傢伙。我們已厭倦您的空談。

column1: We go now.
column2: 我們這就告辭。

column1: Pardon us, but our time is at an end.
column2: 請見諒,我們的時間到了。

column1: You have no technology which interests us.
column2: 您沒有任何能引起我們興趣的科技。

column1: We have no need of \x80 toys.
column2: 我們不需要\x80人的玩意兒。

column1: Your primitive inventions do not interest us.
column2: 您那些原始的發明引不起我們的興趣。

column1: The \x81s are far beyond your technology.
column2: \x81人的科技遠遠超越您的水準。

column1: Emperor \x83, we have little need for what your scientists offer us.
column2: \x83皇帝陛下,您的科學家所能提供的,我們幾乎用不上。

column1: Emperor \x89 sees little of interest in your technology.
column2: \x89皇帝在您的科技中看不出什麼值得關注的。

column1: The \x92s have declared war on our empire. Will you honor our alliance and assault the treacherous \x92s?
column2: \x92人已對我方帝國宣戰。您是否願信守我們的同盟,攻擊背信的\x92人?

column1: The \x92s have declared war on our empire. Will you honor our alliance and join forces to battle our common enemy?
column2: \x92人已對我方帝國宣戰。您是否願信守我們的同盟,聯手迎戰我們共同的敵人?

column1: You have dishonored the agreement. The alliance is broken.
column2: 您背棄了協議。同盟就此破裂。

column1: Very well. Your untrustworthy intentions have shown. The alliance is broken.
column2: 很好。您不可信任的意圖已昭然若揭。同盟就此破裂。

column1: We have little need of treaties that are not honored. The alliance is broken.
column2: 無人遵守的條約,於我們無用。同盟就此破裂。

column1: So be it. The alliance is broken.
column2: 那就如此吧。同盟就此破裂。

column1: Yes, Emperor \x83, the time has come for both our empires to strike out against the \x92s and eliminate them once and for all.
column2: 是的,\x83皇帝,我們兩帝國聯手痛擊\x92人、將其徹底剷除的時刻已經到來。

column1: The \x80s and \x81s must unite to strike down the \x92s.
column2: \x80人與\x81人必須聯合起來,擊倒\x92人。

column1: The \x92 empire must fall before the combined might of the \x80s and \x81s.
column2: \x92帝國必將敗於\x80人與\x81人的聯合威勢之下。

column1: With \x81s and \x80s allied, the \x92s will not last long.
column2: 有了\x81人與\x80人的結盟,\x92人撐不了多久。

column1: In the year \x8f, the \x81 and \x80 empires join forces to rid the galaxy of the \x92 menace.
column2: \x81與\x80兩帝國謹於 \x8f 年攜手合作,將\x92的威脅從銀河中清除。

column1: In view of the threat from the \x92 Empire, the \x80 and \x81 empires have no choice but to unite!
column2: 鑑於\x92帝國的威脅,\x80與\x81兩帝國別無選擇,只能聯合!

column1: We are not amused that you have cast your lot against us.
column2: 您與我們作對,我們可笑不出來。

column1: How could you vote for the vain \x86s? If you continue to rouse my ire, you will know my wrath.
column2: 您怎能投給自負的\x86人?若您繼續激怒我,就會見識到我的怒火。

column1: We have learned to keep our friends close and our enemies even closer. Vote against me again in the Galactic Council and we may be within laser distance...
column2: 我們學會了親近朋友、更要緊盯敵人。再在銀河議會投票與我作對,我們之間恐怕就只剩雷射的距離了……

column1: Your vote cast against the \x81 race has made us a mockery throughout the galaxy. We will not soon forget the humiliation that you have wrought upon us.
column2: 您投票與\x81族作對,使我們淪為整個銀河的笑柄。您加諸我們的羞辱,我們不會輕易忘記。

column1: As your Galactic Council vote indicates, those who are not for us are against us. Consider yourself moved up several places on our to kill list.
column2: 正如您在銀河議會的投票所示,不支持我們的就是與我們為敵。您可以當自己在我們的暗殺名單上往前挪了好幾位。

column1: Et tu, \x83 Beware, for if I should pluck your dagger from my back, I know how to weild it and will teach you to vote against me again.
column2: 連你也一樣嗎,\x83?當心,若我從背上拔出您插的這把匕首,我懂得如何使用它,定會讓您再也不敢投票與我作對。

column1: You realize, of course, the power I wield, and I will squash you like an insect for your electoral treachery.
column2: 您當然清楚我手握的權力,我會為您在選舉中的背叛,把您像蟲子一樣碾碎。

column1: There are penalties for voting against the \x81, as you may soon find out.
column2: 投票與\x81作對是有代價的,您很快就會明白。

column1: Stabbed in the back, right under my nose! Your voting record reads like a political assassin's handbook.
column2: 就在我眼皮底下從背後捅刀!您的投票紀錄讀來活像一本政治刺客的手冊。

column1: If your vile attacks on our good reputation continue, we shall write your deceitful little handbook a most unpleasant ending.
column2: 若您繼續惡意攻擊我們的良好聲譽,我們就為您那本奸詐的小手冊寫個最不堪的結局。

column1: While deceit becomes you, our patience is wearing thin. Casting votes against the \x81 race is the sort of mistake that should only be made once.
column2: 欺詐固然適合您,我們的耐心卻正逐漸耗盡。投票與\x81族作對,是那種只該犯一次的錯。

column1: Although we did not win the election, we are most pleased that you decided to cast your votes with the \x81.
column2: 儘管我們未能贏得這場選舉,但您決定將票投給\x81,令我們深感欣慰。

column1: Well, \x83, this could be the beginning of a beautiful friendship. Thanks for your vote in the Galactic Council meeting.
column2: 好啊,\x83,這或許是一段美好友誼的開端。感謝您在銀河議會會議上的一票。

column1: We are pleased with your voting. With your continued enlightened voting, Emperor \x89 shall unite the galaxy.
column2: 我們對您的投票感到滿意。只要您持續這般明智地投票,\x89皇帝定能統一銀河。

column1: We are flattered that you have voted for the \x81 s. You must pay us a formal visit very soon. Perhaps we can return the favor.
column2: 您投票支持\x81人,令我們受寵若驚。您務必盡快正式造訪我們一趟。或許我們能回報您這份人情。

column1: You show wisdom in casting your votes with us. Despite our natural misgivings, perhaps we will have a prosperous future.
column2: 您將票投給我們,顯見您的明智。儘管我們天生疑慮重重,但或許我們會有一個繁榮的未來。

column1: We take your vote for us as clear gesture that you wish to improve your relations with the mighty \x81 Empire.
column2: 我們把您投給我們的一票,視為您有意改善與強大的\x81帝國關係的明確表示。

column1: Hurrah! And remember, a vote for \x89 is a vote for galactic peace and stability.
column2: 萬歲!別忘了,投給\x89的一票,就是投給銀河和平與安定的一票。

column1: Although we greatly appreciate your vote, the cynics among us wonder what strings might be attached to it.
column2: 儘管我們十分感激您的一票,我們之中的多疑者卻在猜想,這一票背後究竟附帶著什麼條件。
